response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency, and clear ownership mindset through open-source contributions and operational roles — but his resume contains significant red flags including an implausible current role at Google starting in 2025 and a fictional 'Founder, Amazon' position, which undermine credibility despite his genuine technical depth and AI-agent exposure.
strengths: Proven experience in high-throughput distributed systems (e.g., Meta, Dunnhumby)
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and code generation tools at Google
Strong operational ownership demonstrated via open-source projects and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Current role at Google listed as starting in April 2025 — impossible and raises credibility issues
Claim of being 'Founder, Amazon' is factually incorrect and suggests resume inflation
Lack of explicit mention of Python mastery or on-call incident response experience
